title: Accessible Dropdown

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Dropdown
### Requirements numbered list
1. The dropdown should be accessible via keyboard using the down arrow key to navigate through options and the enter key to select an option.
2. The dropdown should be accessible via the mouse by clicking on an option directly.
3. The dropdown options should be read out by the screen reader when an option is focused.
4. The dropdown should close when an option is selected.

constraints: The dropdown should be implemented using vanilla JavaScript and not use any third-party libraries.
The dropdown should use Tailwind CSS for its styling.
The dropdown options should be dynamically generated within the JavaScript code.
The dropdown should be responsive and display nicely on different screen sizes.

gradingCriteria.description: Dropdown is accessible via keyboard using the down arrow key to navigate through options and the enter key to select an option.
Dropdown is accessible via the mouse by clicking on an option directly.
Dropdown options are read out by the screen reader when an option is focused.
Dropdown closes when an option is selected.
